name: Oysters and Artichoke Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichoke hearts as directed on the package.
2. Place in a flat, buttered casserole.
3. Cover with sauteed mushrooms.
4. Cook oysters in their liquid until edges begin to curl. Drain thoroughly in a colander, reserving the liquid.
5. Melt butter and saute onion until tender; add parsley and cook for a minute.
6. Add flour, stirring until smooth.
7. Add enough white wine to oyster liquid to make 1 1/2 cups. Add seasonings and stir constantly until thick.
8. Add oysters and spoon the mixture over artichokes and mushrooms. Arrange lemon slices over top; add a dash or two of paprika and bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until bubbling.
